name: Muhammad Amin
philosophy: O'quvchilar qila oladigan, lekin o'zlari hali bunga ishonmaydigan yutuqlarga va bilimlarga erishishda ularga ishonch berish va yordam ko'rsatish.

portfolioCards.title: Dars berish uslubi
portfolioCards.bullet: Xotirjam va vazmin muhit. O’quvchilar bilan qizishmasdan, har bir mavzuni mukammal o'zlashtirguncha sabr bilan ishlash.

portfolioCards.title: Xarakter va Muhit
portfolioCards.bullet: Dars davomida zerikish va stressni oldini olish uchun kerakli vaqtda hazilkashlik va pozitiv energiya.

portfolioCards.title: Xalqaro tajriba
portfolioCards.bullet: Xorijda Turizm sohasida faoliyat yuritib, real ingliz tili muhitida katta amaliy va muloqot tajribasini orttirgan.

portfolioCards.title: Qiziqishlar va Hobbilar
portfolioCards.bullet: Sportning barcha turlariga faol qiziqish hamda bo'sh vaqtlarda jahon kinosi durdonalarini kuzatish.

subtitles.textUz: Xotirjamlik va ravonlik — Speakingda yuqori ball kalitidir.
subtitles.textEn: Calmness and fluency are the keys to a high score in Speaking.

quiz.question: Which idiom best describes staying calm in a difficult situation?
